modelIdentification.name: MSG_FOM
modelIdentification.purpose: Extensions to the SpaceFOM standard used in simulations authored by Brunel University London and partners.
modelIdentification.description: The Brunel Modelling and Simulation Group (MSG) FOM is designed to support its internal as well as collaborative space projects with alliance partners in the Simulation Exploration Experience (SEE).

interactionClass.name: MSGLanderInteractionRoot
interactionClass.semantics: The base class for all interactions defined in the MSG FOM.

interactionClass.name: MSGLandingRequest
interactionClass.semantics: While on its final approach to the lunar surface, a lander sends this interaction to obtain clearance to land at a specific spaceport.

parameter.name: Lander
parameter.semantics: Name of the lander requesting clearance.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the target spaceport that the lander wants to land at.

interactionClass.name: MSGLandingPermission
interactionClass.semantics: Issued by a spaceport in response to the landing request sent by a lander.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the spaceport that originally received the landing request.

parameter.name: Lander
parameter.semantics: Name of the lander that submitted a landing request to the spaceport issuing this response.

parameter.name: Verdict
parameter.semantics: The outcome of the clearance request represented as 0 (allowed) or 1 (rejected).

interactionClass.name: MSGLanderTouchdown
interactionClass.semantics: Sent by a lander when it has just landed at a spaceport.

parameter.name: Lander
parameter.semantics: Name of the lander that issued this message.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the spaceport where the lander has just landed.

interactionClass.name: MSGLanderTakeoff
interactionClass.semantics: Sent by a lander once it has departed from a spaceport.

parameter.name: Lander
parameter.semantics: Name of the lander that has departed from the spaceport.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the spaceport from whence the lander has departed.

interactionClass.name: MSGLanderDepartureRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Sent by a spaceport to advise the lander currently occupying it to depart immediately.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the spaceport being occupied by the lander.

parameter.name: Lander
parameter.semantics: Name of the lander that is occupying the spaceport.

interactionClass.name: MSGCargoPickupJobAccepted
interactionClass.semantics: Confirmation of the assignment of a rover to fulfill the requested transport mission. It is assumed that the rover is interacting with objects in the same SpaceFOM reference frame.

parameter.name: RequestingObject
parameter.semantics: Name of the object that previously requested the transport mission of this rover.

parameter.name: AssignedRover
parameter.semantics: The rover assigned to this transport mission.

interactionClass.name: MSGCargoPickupJob
interactionClass.semantics: Requests a rover to be dispatched for a transport mission from a pickup location to a delivery location. It is assumed that the rover is interacting with objects in the same SpaceFOM reference frame.

parameter.name: PickupLocation
parameter.semantics: The coordinates of the location that has cargo that needs to be retrieved by the rover.

parameter.name: DeliveryLocation
parameter.semantics: The coordinates of the location where the rover needs to drop off the collected cargo.

parameter.name: CargoType
parameter.semantics: The type of cargo that the rover will be transporting as part of this job.

parameter.name: RequestingObject
parameter.semantics: The name of the object instance that submitted this job to the rover.

interactionClass.name: MSGCargoTransferReady
interactionClass.semantics: Sent by a rover as a follow-up to a CargoPickupJobResponseAccepted interaction, signaling that it has arrived at the previously requested location. It is assumed that the rover is interacting with objects in the same SpaceFOM reference frame.

parameter.name: Rover
parameter.semantics: The name of the rover that has arrived at a rendezvous location.

parameter.name: RequestingObject
parameter.semantics: Name of the object that needs to be notified that the rover has arrived at the previously requested location.

interactionClass.name: MSGCargoTransferComplete
interactionClass.semantics: Sent when an object capable of loading/unloading payload to/from a rover has completed the transfer process.

parameter.name: Rover
parameter.semantics: Name of the rover for which the cargo processing operation was completed.

parameter.name: OperatorObject
parameter.semantics: The name of the object that is executing the transfer operation.

interactionClass.name: MSGCargoPickupJobRejected
interactionClass.semantics: Notification that a previous request for the allocation of a rover for a transport mission by the specified object was rejected.

parameter.name: RequestingObject
parameter.semantics: Name of the object that previously requested a rover to execute transport mission.

interactionClass.name: MSGLogisticsDeliveryRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Sent by a spaceport to the logistics system when it requires materials to replenish the resources aboard a lander in preparation for its departure.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the spaceport requesting delivery of materials.

parameter.name: Materials
parameter.semantics: The materials required by the spaceport that initiated this request.

interactionClass.name: MSGLogisticsDeliveryResponse
interactionClass.semantics: Sent by the logistics system in response to a logistics delivery request previously issued by a spaceport.

parameter.name: Spaceport
parameter.semantics: Name of the spaceport that previously sent a logistics delivery request.

parameter.name: Verdict
parameter.semantics: The outcome of the logistics delivery request represented as 0 (allowed) or 1 (denied).

interactionClass.name: MSGAttributeTransferAvailable
interactionClass.semantics: Notifies all participating federates that the federate mentioned in this interaction is ready to relinquish ownership of certain object attributes that it currently owns.

parameter.name: ProprietorFederate
parameter.semantics: The name of the federate that is ready to relinquish attribute ownership.

parameter.name: TargetObject
parameter.semantics: Name of the object instance whose attribute(s) can be relinquished.

enumeratedData.name: OperationalVerdict
enumeratedData.semantics: The outcome of a decision process by federates/objects which culminates in either an acceptance (1) or a rejection (0).

arrayData.name: MaterialName
arrayData.semantics: The name of a specific material type that can be transported and stored in the simulation.

arrayData.name: MaterialQuantity
arrayData.semantics: The quantity of a specific material type that can be transported and stored in the simulation.

fixedRecordData.name: MaterialMap
fixedRecordData.semantics: Emulation of a map data structure with the material names as keys and corresponding amount as values. While both members of the record are variable in size, the key and value arrays must be of the same lengths.

field.name: MaterialName
field.semantics: Name of the requested materials as keys for this map.

field.name: MaterialQuantity
field.semantics: The amount value per material as key.
